Home.title: 2026 Evergreen Church Summer Retreat
Home.verse: I will meet there with the sons of Israel, and it shall be consecrated by My glory.
Home.intro: We invite you to a Blessed Encounter, where our church family comes together to meet the Lord, who has promised to meet with us.

Register.title: Retreat Registration
Register.subtitle: No login required. After registering, you can request an edit link sent to your email.
Register.contactNote: The edit link will be sent to the head of household's email.
Register.successEditHint: We can send an edit link to your email. Request it from ‘Edit my registration’.
Register.error: Something went wrong during registration. Please try again shortly.
Register.validationName: Either a Korean or English name is required.
Register.emailStepHint: Enter your email first. If you have already registered, you can edit your registration.
Register.alreadyHint: You have already registered with this email. To update your registration, continue below.
Register.alreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Please update your info under 'Edit my registration'.
Register.captchaFailed: Please complete the verification to confirm you're human.
Register.nameStepHint: Enter your name exactly as it was registered (Korean or English spelling both work). Family members included in a household registration can check with their own name.
Register.nameFoundHint: You can receive an edit link at the email below to view or update your registration.
Register.nameFoundNoEmailHint: If you cannot submit a request yourself, please contact Minister Joyce Kim.
Register.nameNotFoundTitle: No registration found under this name
Register.nameNotFoundHint: If you have not registered yet, please continue with the email step to register.
Register.requestEmailIntro: Leave your email below and you can use the edit link once an administrator confirms it.
Register.requestPhoneHint: Helps us verify it is you.
Register.requestEmailDone: Request submitted. You can use the edit link once an administrator confirms it.
Register.requestDuplicate: A request is already pending. Please wait for administrator confirmation.

Edit.title: Edit my registration
Edit.enterEmail: Enter the email you registered with and we'll send you an edit link.
Edit.linkSent: We've emailed you an edit link. Please check your inbox. (The link is valid for 1 hour.)
Edit.linkSentNote: If you don't see it, check your spam folder. You can request once every 60 seconds.
Edit.notFound: No registration was found for that email.
Edit.captchaFailed: Please complete the verification to confirm you're human.
Edit.sendError: Something went wrong sending the link. Please try again shortly.
Edit.validationEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

Admin.title: Admin — Attendee Management
Admin.loginHint: Only authorized pastoral staff and committee members can access this.
Admin.notAdmin: This account does not have admin access.
Admin.newEmailHint: Optional — if provided, the attendee can use the self-edit magic link.
Admin.deleteConfirm: Delete this person? If they are the householder, the earliest-registered remaining member becomes the new householder.
Admin.headHint: If you move a head of household who has members into another household, the earliest-registered remaining member becomes the new head.
Admin.headNotFound: The selected head of household was not found.
Admin.adminRoleHint: After granting, the user must sign out and sign back in for admin access to take effect.
Admin.adminNeedsEmail: Enter and save an email first to grant admin access.
Admin.adminSelfNote: You cannot change your own admin access.
Admin.cannotRemoveSelf: You cannot revoke your own admin access.
Admin.requestsHint: After verifying identity, enter the email on the attendee edit page and mark it processed.

Fields.nameHint: Enter at least one of Korean name or English name.
Fields.partialDateHint: You can leave these blank if the dates are not confirmed yet.
Fields.is_under_6: Under age 6 (fee exempt, not counted in room occupancy)

About.title: About the Retreat
About.verse: There I will meet with the Israelites, and the place will be consecrated by my glory.
About.when: September 5 (Sat) to 7 (Mon), 2026 — two nights and three days.
About.where: We gather at Honor's Haven Retreat & Conference (1195 Arrowhead Rd, Ellenville, NY 12428).
About.fee:
Fees are per person based on room occupancy.
• Double $300 / Triple $250 / Quad $200 (2 nights, meals included)
• Children under 6 are exempt.
• One submission per household.
About.prepare:
• Bible, notebook and pen
• Toiletries and a towel
• Comfortable clothing and walking shoes
• Personal medication
• Personal items for the 2-night stay

Schedule.comingSoon: The schedule will be announced soon.

Speakers.title: Speakers
Speakers.s1Bio:
• B.A. in Business Administration, Hanyang University
• M.Div., Chongshin Theological Seminary
• Th.M. in Old Testament, Daehan Theological Graduate University
• Serves the young adults ministry and the Bible-Keeping Redemptive History Movement Center at Pyungkang Cheil Church
• Speaker, Bible Redemptive History Seminars in LA (2025) and Washington (2026)
Speakers.s2Bio:
• Serves the Bible-Keeping Redemptive History Movement Center at Pyungkang Cheil Church
• Redemptive history lecturer, 2023 Summer Assembly — “Faith Passed Down Across Generations”
• Itinerant Word ministry among churches in the U.S.
Speakers.bioNote: Full biographies will be updated soon.
